event: Church of Saint Francis of Assisi, Pampulha
symbols: parabolic arched roof — the vault of heaven reimagined in modern concrete, sheltering the faithful
bell tower — the call to worship rising above the landscape
reflection in the lake — the mirroring of earthly worship in heavenly reality
description: A photograph of a modernist church building with a distinctive series of parabolic concrete arches forming its roof and walls. The largest arch creates the main nave, with smaller arches extending behind it. The front facade features a blue-tinted glass or tile panel. To the right, a tall, slender concrete bell tower with a lattice-like openwork design rises separately from the main building. The church sits on a grassy area beside a calm lake, with palm trees and other tropical vegetation surrounding it. The building's white curves are perfectly reflected in the still water below.

_meta.title: Church of Saint Francis of Assisi
